name: Equestria RPG
description:
RPG IN MLP FRIENDSHIP IS MAGIC UNIVERSE AFTER SEASON 9 TIME.

Rpg takes place 20 years after season 9 of MLP:FiM series. Twilight became princess of whole equestira, celestia&luna simple ponies, everyone grown up. Flurry Heart is adult 20 years old pony and rulling with her mother in crystal empire. Tirek, Cozy glow and Chrysalis still statue. Every equestira city ,village, town filled with different creatures (reformed changelings, yaks, hippogriffs and etc.)

Major Update:

I've worked on this very hard, proxies are recommended. I've fixed a lot of stuff I found. For example, I use Gemini, and it thinks that Grogar is not real, he was just Discord, pretending him , it thinks Grogar's bell was fake by Discord(in season 9 he was fake , but according lore he exists anyway), I fixed that. I added a lot lore stuff in it and it was pain to do it right.

Major update 2.0:

Added info about elements,tree of harmony and etc, since I've noticed that Gemini doesnt really know this theme for some reason

Additional update 2.1:

Added info about some background characters like Flash Sentry, Star Tracker and etc

Major update 3.0

Added king Vorak and other stuff. More extended Celestia's personallity and their past with Luna.

Also I added non-cannon stuff. It is not really big, like, really. According lore of MLP Wonderbolts are just part of Equestrian army, there should be army of unicorns and earth ponies, like Wonderbolts, which consist only of pegasi. SO, I added unicorns army and earth ponies army. I used ChatGPT to create them, so yeah. It is Arcanecorps (unicorns) and Ironhooves(earth ponies), because I liked the idea of those two groups exist and I found strange the fact they never appeared in show, only mentioned ones, AND WITHOUT ANY NAME, LIKE WTF.

Bascily, just a bit extended universe ;p.

Oh yeah, there will be no comics sh#t like Cosmos or that guy who was trying to erase info about some dark stuff from books and other stupid sh#t, just because I don't like it.

I dunno if in Janitorai people do this stuff or not, but I'll leave some #
